sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Global X Variable Rate Preferred ETF Holdings
feed.summary: This article details the holdings of the Global X Variable Rate Preferred ETF (PFFV), which was established in 2020 by Global X and focuses on broad credit fixed income. The ETF manages $297.86 million in assets across 56 holdings, primarily tracking an index of variable rate US preferred securities. The content also provides a "Recent Changes" section, outlining modifications to the ETF's holdings since late 2023.

feed.title: Why OraSure Technologies, Inc. Shares Jumped
feed.summary: OraSure Technologies' shares jumped by as much as 15% after the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) proposed covering hepatitis-C tests for select high-risk patients. OraSure develops a rapid diagnostic test for HCV, making this potential policy change significant for the company's future revenue. If adopted, the proposal could boost OraSure's financial performance and encourage more baby boomers to get tested.

feed.title: ON24 (ONTF) director’s 141,095 shares cashed out at $8.10
feed.summary: ON24 Inc. director Mitchell Ronald Paul disposed of his 141,095 common stock holdings on April 1, 2026, as part of a merger where ON24 became a wholly-owned subsidiary of Cvent Atlanta, LLC. His shares were converted into the right to receive $8.10 per share in cash, reducing his direct ownership to zero. This transaction was reported in an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Mixed options sentiment in Oklo Inc with shares up 0.56%
feed.summary: Oklo Inc (OKLO) shares rose 0.56%, closing at $48.34, amid mixed options sentiment. Options trading volume was average, with puts outnumbering calls (put/call ratio of 1.13), and implied volatility dropped to its lowest 10% range over the past year. This suggests an expected daily move of $2.59, and an increased demand for downside protection.

feed.title: OPAL Fuels (NASDAQ: OPAL) director gains stock as RSUs vest, new grant
feed.summary: OPAL Fuels Inc. director Betsy L. Battle acquired shares through routine compensation-related transactions. On March 31, 2026, she settled 66,073 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common stock and simultaneously received a new grant of 54,773 RSUs which are scheduled to vest on March 31, 2027. Following these transactions, she directly holds 122,785 shares of Class A common stock and 54,773 unvested RSUs.

feed.title: Duke Energy Corp Stock: A Cornerstone Utility with Robust Growth Prospects in a Shifting Energy Land
feed.summary: Duke Energy Corp (ISIN: US2635341090) is highlighted as a leading U.S. utility provider offering stability and growth potential through its regulated electric and gas operations and a strategic shift towards clean energy. The article details its core business model, financial strength, and competitive position, emphasizing its appeal to North American investors for defensive stability and consistent dividends. It also addresses regulatory risks, climate events, and financing costs as key factors to watch for the company.

feed.title: Should U.S. Bancorp’s Expanded Embedded Lending And Amazon Card Deal Reshape USB Investors’ Expectations?
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has expanded its Avvance point-of-sale lending platform and secured a deal to take over Amazon’s small-business credit card program, previously held by American Express. These strategic moves bolster U.S. Bancorp's position in embedded finance and small-business payments, potentially boosting fee-based revenue. Investors are encouraged to consider these developments in the context of the bank's broader investment narrative, focusing on credit quality, operational efficiency, and customer experience.

feed.title: Insider Shake-Up at Alpine Income Property Trust Grabs Investor Attention
feed.summary: Alpine Income Property Trust Inc (PINE) is under investor scrutiny following Director Andrew Richardson's sale of 2,750 shares worth $49,857. This comes amidst recent positive analyst activity, with Raymond James upgrading the stock due to its valuation and dividend yield, and UBS also lifting its outlook. However, TipRanks' AI Analyst "Spark" rates PINE as Neutral, citing mixed financial performance despite constructive technical momentum and a favorable dividend yield.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of Tradr 1.5X Short NVDA Daily ETF (NASDAQ:NVDS)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of the Tradr 1.5X Short NVDA Daily ETF (NASDAQ:NVDS), detailing indicators like oscillators, moving averages, and pivots. It offers a summary gauge indicating a "sell" signal for NVDS across various timeframes based on these technical metrics. The content cautions users that this information is not investment advice and encourages further research.

feed.title: Olin Corporation First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call Announcement
feed.summary: Olin Corporation announced its first-quarter 2026 earnings conference call will be held on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time. The company's senior management will review financial results, which will be distributed after the market closes on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Details for accessing the call via phone or webcast, as well as replay information, were provided.

feed.title: Energy Vault (NRGV) COO settles RSU taxes with 147,984 withheld shares
feed.summary: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. COO Akshay Ladwa had 147,984 shares of common stock withheld at $3.30 per share on March 31, 2026, to cover tax obligations from vesting restricted stock units. This was a routine tax-withholding transaction, not a market sale. Following this transaction, Ladwa directly holds 2,141,336 shares of common stock in the company.

feed.title: Aug Momentum: Can Forafric Global PLC expand its profit margins - 2026 Action & Verified Swing Trading Watchlists
feed.summary: The article, despite its misleading title and keywords, does not discuss Forafric Global PLC profits or insider buying for ASBP. Instead, it seems to be an amalgamation of irrelevant phrases, stock performance questions for various companies, and agricultural promotional content for Lianping County, China, focusing on peach cultivation and tourism. The repeated phrase "Is ASBP showing insider buying" is present throughout, but no actual financial analysis is provided.

feed.title: Northpointe Bancshares (NPB) CFO nets shares from 7,000 RSUs vesting
feed.summary: Northpointe Bancshares (NPB) EVP and CFO Brad T. Howes received 4,088 net shares after 7,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) vested on April 1, 2026. A total of 2,912 shares, valued at $17.26 per share, were withheld to cover tax obligations. Following these transactions, Howes directly holds 10,221 shares of Northpointe Bancshares common stock.

feed.title: Realty Income (NYSE:O) Insider Michelle Bushore Sells 7,400 Shares
feed.summary: Realty Income insider Michelle Bushore sold 7,400 shares of the company's stock, reducing her stake by 9.86% to 67,641 shares. This transaction, valued at $461,908.00, was executed at an average price of $62.42 per share. The company recently increased its monthly dividend to $0.2705 while reporting quarterly EPS in line with estimates and providing FY2026 guidance, maintaining a consensus "Hold" rating among analysts.

feed.title: Schwab (SCHW) director granted 1,286 nonqualified stock options as board fees
feed.summary: Charles A. Ruffel, a director at Schwab Charles Corp (SCHW), received a grant of 1,286 nonqualified stock options on April 1, 2026, as part of his board compensation. These options, which vested immediately, allow him to purchase shares at an exercise price of $92.36 per share and were issued under the Directors' Deferred Compensation Plan II in lieu of cash fees. This transaction is categorized as a compensation-related award rather than an open-market stock purchase or sale.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of PepGen Inc. - PEPG
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against PepGen Inc. (NASDAQ: PEPG) on behalf of investors. This investigation follows a partial clinical hold by the FDA on PepGen's FREEDOM2-DM1 Phase 2 trial and subsequent disappointing clinical data, which led to significant drops in the company's stock price. Investors are encouraged to contact Pomerantz LLP for information regarding joining a potential class action lawsuit.

feed.title: MYPS Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth overview of PLAYSTUDIOS, Inc. (NASDAQ: MYPS), detailing its business model, financial performance, and stock information. It highlights the company's free-to-play mobile and social games, unique loyalty platforms (playAWARDS and myVIP) that offer real-world rewards, and recent financial and corporate governance updates. The analysis also covers MYPS's stock performance, market capitalization, and compliance status with Nasdaq listing rules.

feed.title: Medpace (NASDAQ: MEDP) director converts 36 RSUs, now holds 32,789 shares
feed.summary: Medpace Holdings director Brian T. Carley converted 36 restricted stock units (RSUs) into 36 common shares on March 31, 2026, bringing his total direct holdings to 32,789 shares. This transaction, stemming from an RSU grant in November 2025, leaves him with 107 outstanding RSUs. The conversion occurred at a stated price of $0.00 per share, as detailed in the recent Form 4 SEC filing.

feed.title: Qualcomm Joins Korea's 'Challenge AX' Program to Support AI Startups
feed.summary: Qualcomm has announced its participation in South Korea's "Challenge AX" program, aimed at supporting domestic artificial intelligence (AI) startups. This initiative, led by the Ministry of SMEs and Startups, connects startups with large corporations like Qualcomm and LG Electronics to accelerate commercialization through proof-of-concept projects. Qualcomm will focus on joint development in areas such as robot control, autonomous mobile robots, and on-device voice/object recognition, utilizing its Dragonwing processors and NPU accelerator cards.
feed.source: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media
feed.source_domain: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media

feed.title: Mineralys (MLYS) CEO sells 75,000 shares, still holds 705k
feed.summary: Mineralys Therapeutics, Inc. CEO Jon Congleton sold 75,000 shares of common stock on March 31, 2026, through a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The sales occurred at weighted-average prices between $25.50 and $27.05 per share. Following these transactions, Congleton's direct holdings in the company amount to 705,051 shares.

feed.title: Daphne Karydas, director at Mineralys, sells $75,000 in MLYS stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Daphne Karydas, a director at Mineralys Therapeutics Inc (MLYS), sold 3,000 shares of common stock for $75,000 and exercised options to acquire 3,000 shares for $36,060 through a pre-arranged trading plan. This transaction occurred as MLYS stock has shown significant momentum, returning 92.6% over the past year, although InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be overvalued despite high analyst price targets. The company recently exceeded Q4 2025 earnings expectations and is advancing its lead drug lorundrostat, alongside a new Chief Legal Officer appointment.

feed.title: First Solar’s New U.S. Facility And Tesla Shift Utility Scale Solar Economics
feed.summary: First Solar plans to open a new 3.7GW finishing facility in the U.S. to reduce tariff exposure and align with domestic incentives, which could impact its cost structure and competitive position. Concurrently, Tesla is entering the U.S. solar manufacturing equipment market, potentially shifting bargaining power and technology choices in the utility-scale solar sector. These developments introduce both opportunities and risks for First Solar, including potential margin improvements, but also new competitive pressures from Tesla.

feed.title: Does Costco’s Gas and Business-Center Push Deepen Its Membership Moat for Investors in COST?
feed.summary: Costco is expanding its membership moat through initiatives like stand-alone gas stations and Business Centres, which cater to both consumers and commercial clients. These strategies aim to boost traffic and membership fees without compromising Costco's bulk-value identity. While the moves support revenue and membership growth, investors should consider potential challenges such as rising labor costs and increased competition.

feed.title: Assessing AES (AES) Valuation As Mixed Returns Contrast With Discounted Earnings Multiple
feed.summary: AES Corporation's valuation presents a mixed picture, with a "Most Popular Narrative" suggesting it is 99.4% overvalued with a fair value of $7.17 against a current share price of $14.30. However, other market multiples, like its P/E ratio of 10.9x compared to the global renewable energy group's 16.9x, suggest potential value. The article encourages investors to analyze both the bearish and potentially optimistic views before making investment decisions.

feed.title: NextPlat sets 1-for-10 reverse stock split effective April 13 By Investing.com
feed.summary: NextPlat Corp (NASDAQ:NXPL) will implement a one-for-ten reverse stock split, effective April 13, 2026, consolidating every ten shares into one. This move aims to reduce outstanding shares from 26.9 million to approximately 2.7 million while the par value remains unchanged. The company's shares are currently trading at $0.45, having declined 28% in the last week and 53% over six months, reflecting recent financial challenges including an 18% revenue decline in 2025.

feed.title: Energy Vault (NYSE: NRGV) CEO holds 13.4% stake and keeps voting control
feed.summary: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. CEO Robert Piconi reported a beneficial ownership of 23,417,827 shares, representing 13.4% of the company as of March 13, 2026. This stake includes directly held shares, shares controlled via irrevocable proxies, and stock options. Despite disposing of some shares in a family-related settlement, Piconi retained strong voting control through proxies. The CEO also indicated potential future actions such as buying/selling shares, entering into financial instruments, or considering strategic corporate transactions like mergers or changes to capitalization.

feed.title: Ronald Bucchi Sells 11,000 Shares of Lightwave Logic (NASDAQ:LWLG) Stock
feed.summary: Ronald Bucchi, a director at Lightwave Logic (NASDAQ:LWLG), sold 11,000 shares of the company's stock on April 1st, 2026, for a total of $76,120. This sale reduced his position by 3.6% to 294,879 shares. The stock experienced a significant jump in trading, but company fundamentals remain weak, with negative earnings and revenue, and analysts widely rate it as a "Sell".

feed.title: Leggett & Platt (LEG) CFO receives stock grant and updates holdings
feed.summary: Leggett & Platt's Executive Vice President and CFO, Benjamin Michael Burns, received a stock award of 136.5034 shares of common stock valued at $8.2365 per share. This grant increased his direct holdings to 190,673.0931 shares and the filing also detailed his indirect holdings, including shares in retirement plans and those held by his spouse. The transactions were reported in an SEC Form 4 filing, indicating a compensation-related grant.

feed.title: S&P 500's Weakest Trading Days Signal Persistent Weakness for U.S. Investors in SPY ETF
feed.summary: The S&P 500 has exhibited a troubling pattern of significant declines on its weakest trading days over the past six months, impacting U.S. investors holding the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY). This consistent average loss of 0.54% on such days, highlighted by Bespoke Investment Group, signals broader market fragility and calls for reassessment of portfolio exposure. The article explores the implications for investors, historical context, sector impacts, and risk management strategies to navigate this persistent weakness amid economic uncertainties.

feed.title: Andrea Drasites Named Head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance For Metlife
feed.summary: MetLife Investment Management (MIM) has announced Andrea Drasites will join as global head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance, effective October 1, 2026. She will oversee the company's commercial mortgage, equity real estate, and agricultural investments portfolios, which amounted to $108.9 billion in assets under management as of December 31, 2025. Drasites brings extensive experience from Blackstone, where she was a senior managing director in the Real Estate Group.

feed.title: MFS Multimarket Income Trust (NYSE: MCR) moves special meetings to April 15, 2026
feed.summary: MFS Multimarket Income Trust (MCR) has adjourned its special shareholder meetings to April 15, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This adjournment is to gather more votes on proposed reorganizations where four Target Funds will merge into MFS Multimarket Income Trust. The proposals also include appointing abrdn, Inc. as the investment adviser for the Surviving Fund, electing new trustees, and issuing additional common shares.

feed.title: Dow Inc. Stock: Materials Leader Faces Evolving Chemical Sector Dynamics and Sustainability Pressure
feed.summary: Dow Inc. is a global materials science leader navigating challenges in packaging, infrastructure, and sustainable innovation. The company's diversified portfolio and strategic focus on sustainability initiatives position it for long-term viability despite cyclical risks and competitive landscapes. North American investors find Dow appealing for its dividend yield and exposure to U.S.-centric growth, while monitoring macroeconomic indicators and the pace of sustainable product adoption.

feed.title: Director Marquina at Logistic Properties (LPA) awarded 45,000 RSUs
feed.summary: Javier Marquina, a director at Logistic Properties of the Americas (LPA), was granted 45,000 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on April 1, 2026, as per a recent Form 4 filing. These RSUs, which represent the right to receive one Ordinary Share each, were awarded under the company’s 2024 Equity Incentive Plan and are fully vested as of the grant date. Following these transactions, Marquina directly holds 31,968 Ordinary Shares of LPA.

feed.title: Director at Schwab (SCHW) granted 393 RSUs in lieu of cash fees
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corporation director Stephen A. Ellis received a grant of 393 restricted stock units (RSUs) as compensation, in lieu of cash director fees. These RSUs are held in a rabbi trust and will be distributed when he leaves the Board. After this transaction, Ellis holds a total of 12,851.98 RSUs, which includes units from dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: KLA Corporation Announces $7 Billion Share Buyback, Stock Rises 3.7%
feed.summary: KLA Corporation's stock rose 3.7% after the company announced a new $7 billion share buyback program, increasing its total buyback capacity to nearly $11 billion. This move signals management's confidence in the company's financial health and future prospects, despite recent market volatility and concerns over geopolitical tensions impacting semiconductor supply chains. The stock has appreciated since the start of the year but remains below its peak value.

feed.title: Deere & Co Stock: Navigating Agricultural Cycles and Industrial Strength in a Changing Economy
feed.summary: Deere & Co (ISIN: US2435371073) is a leading manufacturer of agricultural and construction equipment under the John Deere brand. The company's core business model emphasizes recurring revenue from parts, service, and precision agriculture solutions, providing stability in cyclical markets driven by global food demand and infrastructure needs. Deere invests heavily in innovation and sustainability, focusing on autonomous farming and electric machinery to meet labor shortages and environmental regulations, making it an attractive option for North American investors seeking exposure to stable food production and infrastructure growth.

feed.title: Meta, Alliant Energy, & BDADC Make Case for Beaver Dam AI Data Center
feed.summary: Officials from Meta, Alliant Energy, and the Beaver Dam Area Development Corporation addressed public concerns regarding the $1 billion AI data center under construction in Beaver Dam. They clarified that the facility would use a dry closed-loop system for water, reducing water consumption, and that energy costs would not be passed on to other consumers. The officials also discussed the history of the project, including the use of Non-Disclosure Agreements, and Meta's commitment to long-term operation of its data centers.

feed.title: Director at LiveOne (LVO) settles 20,040 RSUs into common stock
feed.summary: LiveOne, Inc. director Kristopher Wright converted 20,040 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into an equivalent number of common shares. These RSUs were granted as director fees for service from October 1, 2024, to September 30, 2025, and were settled without a cash exercise price. Following this transaction, Wright directly holds 175,090 shares of LiveOne common stock, with no remaining derivative positions reported.

feed.title: Bridget Baker gains 21,153 LiveOne (LVO) shares from RSU vesting
feed.summary: LiveOne director, Bridget Baker, received 21,153 shares of LiveOne common stock through the vesting of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on March 31, 2026. These RSUs were granted as director fees for her board service from October 1, 2024, to September 30, 2025. Following this transaction, Baker directly holds 268,684 shares of LiveOne common stock, and no open-market purchases or sales were involved.

feed.title: LiveOne (LVO) director settles 21,153 RSUs into stock, holding 278,680 shares
feed.summary: LiveOne, Inc. director Patrick D. Wachsberger converted 21,153 restricted stock units (RSUs) into 21,153 shares of common stock, which were granted as director fees for service. This transaction resulted in Wachsberger directly holding 278,680 shares of LiveOne common stock. The settlement was a compensation-related derivative exercise and did not involve an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: A Look At Neurocrine Biosciences (NBIX) Valuation After New INGREZZA Data In Older Tardive Dyskinesia Patients
feed.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences recently presented new data on its INGREZZA treatment for tardive dyskinesia in older adults at the PALTC26 conference. Despite a 28% total shareholder return over the past year, the company's valuation of US$131.60 per share suggests it is 26.1% undervalued compared to a narrative-based fair value of US$178.04, driven by its broad pipeline and innovation. However, its current P/E ratio of 27.6x is higher than peers, indicating potential pricing pressure and concentration risk.

feed.title: Does PDD’s Higher Sales But Lower Profitability Change The Bull Case For PDD Holdings (PDD)?
feed.summary: PDD Holdings Inc. reported higher sales but lower net income and earnings per share for Q4 and full-year 2025, indicating that heavy spending is impacting profitability. This shift, along with new leadership appointments, emphasizes a trade-off between revenue growth and profit margins. Investors are evaluating whether current investments will stabilize earnings or if prolonged pressure on profit margins will persist.

feed.title: Liberty Latin America (LILA) director awarded Class A and C share grants
feed.summary: Liberty Latin America director Brendan J. Paddick received grants of 958 Class A Common Shares at $8.64 per share and 1,915 Class C Common Shares at $8.82 per share on March 31, 2026. These equity awards are part of his nonemployee director compensation under the 2018 Incentive Plan. Following these transactions, Paddick directly holds 1,459,542 Class A and 1,984,140 Class C common shares.

feed.title: Lynx1 fund tied to Weston Nichols adds Korro Bio (KRRO) position
feed.summary: Lynx1 Master Fund LP, associated with Lynx1 Capital Management LP and Weston Nichols, has purchased 520 shares of Korro Bio, Inc. (KRRO) common stock at $10.60 per share, as reported in a recent SEC Form 4 filing. This transaction brings their indirect holdings to 1,538,296 shares. Both Lynx1 Capital Management LP and Weston Nichols disclaim beneficial ownership except for any pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Karman Holdings (KRMN) CEO Jon Rambeau submits initial Form 3
feed.summary: Karman Holdings Inc. CEO Jon Rambeau has filed an initial Form 3, an SEC document indicating his beneficial ownership upon becoming an insider. The filing, which is a standard procedure for new officers, shows no reported buy, sell, acquisition, or disposition transactions for KRMN shares, nor any listed derivative positions at this time. This Form 3 serves as an initial inventory of his holdings, providing transparency for investors.

feed.title: MCGRATH RENTCORP (MGRC) strategy chief receives 2,265 RSU award via spouse holding
feed.summary: MCGRATH RENTCORP's Chief Strategy Officer, Kristina Van Trease, was awarded 2,265 restricted stock units (RSUs) through a spouse's holding under the 2016 Stock Incentive Plan. These RSUs vest over three years, with 33% on each of the first two anniversaries and 34% on the third. This grant increases the indirect holdings tied to company equity compensation to 7,236 units, consisting of 4,971 shares of common stock and the newly acquired unvested RSUs.

feed.title: Is Korn Ferry (KFY) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Stagnation?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Korn Ferry (KFY) using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio models to assess its current valuation. Despite recent share price stagnation, both methods suggest that KFY is undervalued, with the DCF model indicating a 52.4% undervaluation and the P/E ratio placing it below industry averages. The analysis provides insights for investors considering KFY's long-term prospects.

feed.title: Executive at MCGRATH RENTCORP (MGRC) receives 2,265 restricted stock units in equity award
feed.summary: MCGRATH RENTCORP (MGRC) has granted Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer David M. Whitney 2,265 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of his equity compensation. These RSUs will vest over three years, with 33% vesting on the first and second anniversaries, and 34% on the third. Following this award, Whitney holds 4,971 common shares and 2,265 unvested RSUs, totaling 7,236 equity-linked interests in the company.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) SVP receives new stock options and restricted shares
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty's Senior Vice President, Christopher Lialios, received new equity awards, including options to purchase 757 shares at an exercise price of $522.71 per share and 519 restricted shares. These awards increase his direct common stock holdings to 3,550 shares. The options vest annually over four years starting in 2027, and the restricted shares vest entirely in 2029.

feed.title: State Street SPDR標普資本市場ETF-KCE-ETF配息狀況
feed.summary: This article provides the dividend distribution status for the State Street SPDR S&P Capital Markets ETF (KCE). It lists historical dividend details including record dates, ex-dividend dates, payment dates, currency, short-term and long-term capital gains, and total distribution amounts for recent years. The article also defines key terms such as short-term and long-term capital gains, ex-dividend record date, and registration date, and provides disclaimers regarding performance calculations and investment risks.
